hero.headline: Teach What You Know, Earn What You're Worth
hero.subheadline: Join 300+ Student-Teachers earning $500-2,000+ monthly while helping others succeed.

items.title: Earn 70% of Every Session
items.description: The highest take-home rate in the industry. A $35/hour session puts $24.50 in your pocket.

items.title: Your Schedule, Your Rules
items.description: Set your availability. Accept sessions when you want. No minimums or quotas.

items.title: Learn by Teaching
items.description: Teaching is the best way to solidify your own knowledge. Get paid to become an expert.

items.title: Build Your Reputation
items.description: Collect reviews, earn badges, and build a teaching portfolio for your career.

items.title: Work From Anywhere
items.description: All you need is a laptop and internet. Teach from home, a cafe, or while traveling.

items.title: Join a Community
items.description: Connect with other teachers, share tips, and grow together.

requirements.title: What You Need
required: Complete a Peerloop course with 85%+ score
Receive a recommendation from your Student-Teacher
Complete our Teaching Best Practices module (2 hours)

steps.title: Complete a Course
steps.description: Finish any Peerloop course with a score of 85% or higher. Focus on really mastering the material.

steps.title: Get Recommended
steps.description: Your Student-Teacher can recommend you for certification if they believe you'd be a great tutor.

steps.title: Certification Interview
steps.description: A 20-minute video call with the course creator to verify your knowledge and teaching potential.

steps.title: Teaching Training
steps.description: Complete our Teaching Best Practices module covering pedagogy, platform tools, and student success.

steps.title: Start Teaching!
steps.description: Set your availability, set your rate, and start accepting students. Earnings deposited weekly.

earnings.title: What Can You Earn?
earnings.note: These figures represent your take-home after the 70% split. No additional fees.

testimonials.name: Alex Rivera
testimonials.quote: I was nervous about teaching at first, but my students often thank me for explaining things the way I wish someone had explained to me. And the extra $800/month doesn't hurt either.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.quote: Teaching has made me 10x better at my day job. I understand design so much deeper now. Plus I've built relationships with students who are now colleagues.

testimonials.name: Marcus Thompson
testimonials.quote: I quit my tutoring center gig for Peerloop. Same work, 2x the pay, no commute. I set my own schedule and actually enjoy teaching now.

dayInLife.title: A Day in the Life

schedule.activity: Coffee break + reply to student messages

dayInLife.flexibility: This is just one example. Some teachers do mornings, some evenings, some weekends only. You decide.

faq.question: What if I don't feel qualified to teach?
faq.answer: If you completed the course with 85%+, you know the material. Teaching isn't about being a professor—it's about helping someone who's a few steps behind you. You remember exactly what confused you, and that's your superpower.

faq.question: How many hours do I need to commit?
faq.answer: There's no minimum. Some teachers do 2 hours a week, some do 30. Set your availability for when you're free, and only accept sessions you want.

faq.question: What if a student is difficult?
faq.answer: Our support team is always available. We have guidelines for handling challenging situations, and you can always decline to work with a particular student.

faq.question: Do I need my own curriculum or materials?
faq.answer: No! You teach the course curriculum designed by the creator. All materials, assignments, and assessments are provided. You just deliver the 1-on-1 instruction.

faq.question: How do I get paid?
faq.answer: Earnings are calculated in real-time and paid out weekly via Stripe direct deposit. You can see your balance anytime in your dashboard.

enrolled.headline: Ready to Start Teaching?
enrolled.subheadline: You've completed courses on Peerloop. See which ones you can teach.

notEnrolled.headline: Start Your Journey
notEnrolled.subheadline: First, complete a course. Then, start earning by teaching it.
